transcript.text: Get back from the HubSpot conference.
First person I talked to was working for a company that cleans offices.
You kind of have to be like a vendor at things like that to get a bunch of quality leads, you know, because they're like walking through your area with a booth the whole time.
And you've got like ways to engage.
It'd just be like rolling the dice if I stayed there all day trying to talk to people.
Let me pull the dock up and we'll jump right in.
Do you have access to Marcel's email account?
It's just, I think, every, like, 14 days or something, it logs me out from delegation access.
Well, I'm also a delegate, so I'm not sure if I can do that as a So it's only Marcel that can?
Today will be quick and light because I'm just kind of catching up.
But strategy sprints, we are set for next week for the 8th.
LightSource should be signing any day now.
We're trying to get him signed today.
We don't really have a backup for the 8th unless we wanted to move the 15th up by one week.
you know the latest there, George?
No, I know they're still trying to pitch internally.
And Carolu asked for more info to pitch for CEO and more stats on what we did for Ramp.
And so that is the latest as of today.
Also, for these strategy sprints, Engine is a current client of ours.
We pitched them a 30K strategy sprint because they want to relaunch or they want to launch a new website and business line.
And they're super, super, super down.
So wondering where we can fit them in here.
They're like a really good client that we use as like one of our key examples on every webinar, like all that stuff.
So and they're very, very eager.
They've been asking us like every day this week when we could start.
I wanted to get with you on when you think the best sprint date is to slot them.
The answer would be definitely it depends.
Are we trying to do more than two sprints in a week at this point or no?
Are these next three weeks all fully booked?
The eighth will have two if light source or lovable signs.
22nd has one signed and one that's like a super strong verbal that we've like, dotted I's, cross T's on.
The 29th, we can definitely get a second through all of these, but there is, you know, two spots currently open.
So I would say 29th or eighth if we want to do a third.
Yeah, or we do a third one.
Let me think about it and see how the team, see if they're going to be too stretched.
But it should be easy because we already did a full sprint with them before.
I'd like to Kyle because he's the one who's going to be running this account.
Yeah, I'm a little bit like out of the loop on these, for example, the legacy clients that could have a strategy sprint engagement, like how I should be involved on those.
Like, I just didn't want to screw you over if you already had someone slotted in or whatnot.
So you have a lot of the context on the timeline and who's slotted in where.
Yeah, if they're ready to move quick, I would probably, you know, look to the 8th or the 15th where they'd be like the third on either week or the 29th if we want to proactively book them.
These are just like two small things that could be helpful to catch up with Marcel on.
We had a meeting with Octave, the CEO there, like on August 14th, team partnership focused, but I like didn't know if there were any next steps from that.
So I guess I can connect with Marcel this.
Week on that meeting and then this meeting, which got a follow-up scheduled for next week.
And then for needs action, I had these in there last week.
George, did we reach out to Positron or Fieldwire?
I wrote a draft for you on both since we're going to do that now.
Yeah, I think Fieldwire, we have a call scheduled.
It's Field Guide that we have a call scheduled for.
Got it, got it, got it.
These are two that are just real easy.
think Positron, this would be the Slack channel, and then Fieldwire, Marcel CC'd on the email.
Since I just got logged out of this email, can you send this, the HeyAntonia email to Fieldwire, please, in the email thread?
I'm caught up on all of our urgent kickoffs.
There's no next steps that are waiting.
Bridget took care of all the stuff in my absence.
The only thing that probably would be best to talk about if Jason was here is the event tomorrow night, anything that's top of mind for him.
Talk to as many people as we can.
Book, you know, meetings that we can have after the event, not too far out in the future.
Anything context-wise that you have that I don't?
No, no, let's have fun and try to get some deals in the door.
Dick, do you have access to Marcel Slack too?
Can you send this message above in the Positron external channel, please?
Digg, George, anything you want to chat through?
Nah, I just got a lot of other balls in the air, so I got to go do all of that.
So I'm pretty clear on this.
We just got to get that figured out, but a lot of it's on them.
So both kicked off this week.
So Light Green is not 100% already signed.
Yeah, Green is like, it's in a super good spot.
The lighter color, it's like a blue, is like...
Oh, I just can't see the difference.
Light Horse is blue right now.
My screen was Light Horse is like, we're inches away, but it's not a done deal yet.
I got to update some of these from last week.
I'll get the color coding updated on like some of these, like Norman.
AI should be light blue, and these should be blue, but yeah, that's how I'll color code it.
Yeah, no, that makes total sense.
I was wondering, like, if I look at it async, just make sure I'm getting it right.
But yeah, that totally makes sense.
So, like, these three greens would be light blue, and then we'd be up to date.
I know we chatted, like, later last week before I went out, but anything on your mind that I could help with?
But this is really helpful to join this meeting, especially.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review sales pipeline and discuss upcoming strategy sprints and client engagements.](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strategy sprints scheduled for upcoming weeks with potential for 2-3 clients per week](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [LightSource and Lovable deals progressing, with LightSource expected to sign imminently](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Engine (existing client) eager to book a $30K strategy sprint for new website/business line launch](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Team preparing for networking event tomorrow night to generate leads and book meetings](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

## Topics

### HubSpot Conference Debrief

  - [Tyler attended but found it challenging to generate quality leads](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Conference setup favors vendors with booths for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Attendee mix varied widely, including non-target companies (e.g., office cleaning services)](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

### Strategy Sprint Schedule

  - [Sept 8th: Two slots potentially filled (LightSource pending, no backup)](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Sept 15th: Two slots currently booked](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Sept 22nd: One signed, one strong verbal commitment](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Sept 29th: One slot open, potential for second booking](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Engine (existing client) eager to book $30K sprint, considering 8th, 15th, or 29th](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Team discussing possibility of running 3 sprints in a week](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

### Client Updates

  - [LightSource: Expected to sign imminently for Sept 8th sprint](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Lovable: In progress, details to be finalized](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [The Bulls: Still in internal pitching phase, reviewing SOW](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Engine: Existing client, very eager to start new $30K strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Octave: Follow-up needed with Marcel regarding Aug 14th meeting](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Positron and Fieldwire: Outreach pending, draft messages prepared](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

### Upcoming Networking Event

  - [Scheduled for tomorrow night](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Strategy: Engage with as many people as possible, generate interest in GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Goal: Book near-future meetings with potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

### Pipeline Management

  - [Color coding system in place for deal stages:](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [Green: 100% confirmed deals](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [Light Blue: Very close to closing, but not finalized](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [Blue: In progress, good potential](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to update color coding on pipeline document for clarity](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [George to consult with Kyle about Engine sprint scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Dignory to send prepared messages to Positron (via Slack) and Fieldwire (via email)](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)
  - [Team to prepare for tomorrow night's networking event](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Follow up with Marcel regarding Octave meeting outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Continue pushing for LightSource and Lovable deal closures](https://fathom.video/share/wKvFrzDc4NnnwBbDLrici6CxThMBSTKT?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

action_items.description: Connect w/ Marcel re Octave meeting (Aug 14) next steps
Send "HeyAntonia" email to Fieldwire in existing thread
Send Tyler's msg to Positron in external Slack channel
Update color coding for Norman.AI & other clients in tracking doc
